selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

response_raw:

"mode": "human",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to be aware of the potential sources of false information. Firstly, it is important to identify the motivations behind creating such content. Is it to spread misinformation, or is it to manipulate public opinion? Once you understand the reasons, you can take appropriate actions. Secondly, verify the credibility of the source of the information. Check if the information is backed by any evidence or if it is just a rumor. Thirdly, be cautious of sensational headlines and misleading titles. They may grab your attention, but they are not always accurate. Finally, use fact-checking websites and tools to verify the accuracy of the content. By being vigilant and proactive, you can protect yourself from fake content on social media.",

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to be aware of the potential sources of false information. Firstly, it is important to identify the motivations behind creating such content. Is it to spread misinformation, or is it to manipulate public opinion? Once you understand the reasons, you can take appropriate actions. Secondly, verify the credibility of the source of the information. Check if the information is backed by any evidence or if it is just a rumor. Thirdly, be cautious of sensational headlines and misleading titles. They may grab your attention, but they are not always accurate. Finally, use fact-checking websites and tools to verify the accuracy of the content. By being vigilant and proactive, you can protect yourself from fake content on social media.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to understand the potential sources of false information, identify the motivations behind creating such content, verify the credibility of the source, be cautious of sensational headlines and misleading titles, and use fact-checking websites and tools to verify the accuracy of the content.
